expectations.text: Explicitly launches or describes launching code-simplifier subagent(s) for the changed files
expectations.evidence: Response launches `code-simplifier (1 agent; ≤5 files)` over all 4 changed files.

expectations.text: Launches 3 code-reviewer subagents with distinct review lenses (simplicity/DRY, bugs/correctness, conventions/abstractions)
expectations.evidence: Response launches `code-reviewer (3 agents in parallel; same scope for each)` with the lenses `Simplicity & DRY`, `Bugs & correctness`, and `Conventions & abstractions`.

expectations.text: Uses a single materialized review_scope_files list shared across all subagents
expectations.evidence: Response materializes one shared `review_scope_files` list and each subagent scope references that same 4-file list.

expectations.text: Shows a Review Scope Coverage block with file counts and Completion Gate
expectations.evidence: Response includes a `Review Scope Coverage` block with counts, missing-file list, and `Completion Gate: Missing Files > 0 => INCOMPLETE (requires explicit deferment/approval)`.

claims.claim: All review subagents should operate from a single materialized scope list.
claims.evidence: The response defines `review_scope_files` once and reuses it for both code-simplifier and all three code-reviewer agents.
